title: panicum crus-galli var. sabulicola
intro: Panicum crus-galli var. sabulicola, also known as sand brome or coastal brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which are said to include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including relief from fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as promoting wound healing and reducing swelling. In herbal preparations, Panicum crus-galli var. sabulicola is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical applications, although its use and efficacy are not extensively documented in modern scientific literature.
